subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! The letter thou didst inscribe hath been perused. Although time [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه ای که بافنان مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گردید هر چند فرصت
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @transcending the material condition, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
